headline: ESP 1–0 ARG — the favourite flipped, an upset the money never saw, decided in extra time.

supersedes.reason: sealed at the 90' whistle (StatusId 5) while the match was still alive; the wire then signalled extra time (StatusId 6 at 21:16:20Z, ET kickoff 21:19:07Z) and Spain won 1-0 at 105'. The superseded record claims ESP 0-0 ARG decided in 90.
